name: New Potatoes Baked in Cream
recipeIngredient: 10 Small red skinned new potatoes, (10 to 15)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes in warm water.
2. Slice them into 1/8-inch thick slices.
3. Place the sliced potatoes in an 8-inch square pan.
4. Add cream, minced garlic, salt, and pepper.
5. Toss until everything is mixed.
6. Cover tightly with aluminum foil and make a hole in the center about the size of a half dollar.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
8. Remove foil and bake another 10 minutes or until cream is bubbly and the top has browned.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley or chives.
Serves 6 to 8.
